long_description: High latency in ca-tor noticed. Related to a single customer workflow. Customer buckets added to rate limit and updated one that already existed, all for a single customer.
short_description: High latency noticed in the CA-TOR offering for COS. Related to a single customer workflow.
close_notes:
Customer buckets added to rate limit:

vpc_service_logs_dal_int_bucket_data_get reduced to 5000/second

vpc-service-logs-dal-stage02-bucket-data setting rate limit to 5000/second
customer_facing_impact: Customer encountered higher than normal latencies when executing operations against their following 2 buckets: vpc_service_logs_dal_int_bucket_data_get and vpc-service-logs-dal-stage02-bucket-data, due to the high volume of requests hitting COS.
customers_impacted:
The 2 following buckets were impacted:
vpc_service_logs_dal_int_bucket_data_get
vpc-service-logs-dal-stage02-bucket-data
